title: dasiphora fruticosa var. leucantha
intro: Dasiphora fruticosa var. leucantha, also known as Russian sage or Prickly Sage, is a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasiphora fruticosa var. leucantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
